The following events occurred in '''1010 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Skere Kaan]] founded the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]].<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> Kaan proclaims himself [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]].
*[[Seviss Vaa]] creates the [[Behemoth from the World Below]] on [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]].

==Battles==
*[[Duel between Kas'im and Na'daz]].<ref name="PoD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref>

==Births==
*[[Darth Zannah/Legends|Zannah]] on [[Somov Rit]]<ref name="PoD" />
*[[Nalia Adollu]] on [[Corsin/Legends|Corsin]]<ref name="RoT">''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''</ref>

==Deaths==
*[[Na'daz]]<ref name="PoD" />
*[[Wud Mortull]]<ref name="JVS">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>

==Appearances==

*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{1stm}} {{ID|"Hundreds and hundreds of years ago"}}
